name: PairScape
description: PairScape is a relaxing tile-matching adventure set in a vibrant world of fresh vegetables and blooming flowers. Match identical tiles to clear the board, unlock new stages, and journey through over 100 beautifully designed levels that gradually challenge your memory and focus. From crisp carrots and juicy tomatoes to colorful tulips and roses, every level brings a delightful garden of shapes and colors to pair.
